## Session — 2026-04-29 16:20

Completed the migration script for adding the chunk_date column to content_vectors. Tested against a copy of the production database — migration runs in under 2 seconds for 50,000 rows. No data loss observed.

### Decisions

- [decision] Migration scripts must be idempotent and safe to re-run
- [decision] Database backups taken automatically before any schema migration

### Pending Items

- [pending] Update the deployment runbook with the new migration steps
- [pending] Verify that the FTS5 rebuild process handles the new column correctly

### Actions

- [action: agent-beta] Push the migration script to the develop branch
- [action: agent-alpha] Validate the migration output against the expected schema version

### Notes

The migration approach uses ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN which is well-supported in SQLite. Confirmed that existing queries continue to work without modification after the migration. The chunk_date column enables temporal filtering at the vector level, which is needed for the date-range search feature.
